channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Why does /biz hate Pokemon? I've literally told many of you for YEARS to invest in it but you all still think it's just… — 59 replies — 236.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why does /biz hate Pokemon? I've literally told many of you for YEARS to invest in it but you all still think it's just…

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:45 UTC

OP

Why does /biz hate Pokemon? I've literally told many of you for YEARS to invest in it but you all still think it's just a stupid card game for children.

Early replies (first 3)

62181434
>>62181426
No I rather not sit on ebay all day getting messages from browns trying to haggle the prices down. Easier and more convient ways to make money, this shit will have so many bagholders just like the meme sport cards

62181436
I have a box of pokemon cards that I had when I was a kid, are they worth anything or just the rare shiny card in absolute peak mint condition?

62181438
>>62181426
How can shiny plastic cards cost so much? Even if they're limited in supply, how can there exist so much demand for them?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62183100
Alternate Currency: Pokemon cards are an alternate currency outside the governments control

Vested Interest: People who pump have a strong desire to keep the Pokemon market running hot

Ridiculous Valuations: Scarcity, demand, condition. These factors amplify prices beyond normal comprehension

Revenge of the Nerds: Most Pokemon fans have so much disposable cash because they work in lucrative, geeky fields

Think of the Children: Poke-mania is a plague that has infested every generation since it arrived

Cardboard Tsunami: If you think Pokemon cards are overprinted, just look at the diabolical pull rates for the top chase cards

Sense of Belonging: The hobby grows daily because Pokemon fans are wholesome and friendly in general

Gamba Grindset: Opening packs is essentially legalized gambling for children and the appeal isn’t going away any time soon

Hoarding Sickness: Sentimental people have no intention of selling because their cards represent precious memories or emotional attachments

Sensei Knows Best: Japan is famous for their careful treatment of the brand because they see Pokemon as a national treasure

Eternal Icons: Pikachu never has to retire. Charizard never tore an ACL. These characters are always in their prime

Investment-grade FOMO: You can always count on rich people to become envious of anything that gains value without them. Now they’re dogpiling in

Do You Feel Lucky Punk: So you got lucky opening your pack, winning your bid, etc. Why not roll the dice again and get it graded for peak gainz

Eagle Eye: Study these cards closely and you’ll see they’re printed with a number of anti-counterfeit measures

Swindler’s Paradise: People don’t value cards correctly. This leaves all kinds of wiggle room for haggling and arbitrage

Lost Forever: Nobody knew this would happen. A good percentage of vintage cards are rotting in landfills, flooded in the basement, etc.

62183107
>>62183100
Thanks AnonGPT

62183191
>>62183078
Oh please, crypto is fucking dead at this point now. Pokemon is still an actual tangible item that you can hold onto IRL, it's like paintings that richfags collect.

62183207
>>62181426
I wish the same thing would happen to 40k.

62183219
Concentrated Value: A lightweight collection of cards could hold enough value to buy a house outright. Heavy purchasing power in the palm of your hand

Animal Instincts: Monkey want shiny. Monkey follow trend. Don't underestimate these fundamental laws of nature

Pallet of Pleasure: There's intense demand for sealed products which are logistically simple and have the highest liquidity

Laugh at Inflation: Pokémon card holders stand proud when comparing their holdings against USD

Picassos are Cheesy: Historically money laundering schemes involving artwork were reserved for the elites. Miniature handheld artwork is superior because it has a larger natural market cap

Mogging Crypto: Pokémon cards have seen higher gains than crypto and enjoy more speculative upside than crypto, in exchange for patience

Can't Survive Without It: There's a considerable micro-economy of people who benefit from this hype every month. Etsy plushies, homemade crafts, fan art cards. All profitable

Safe Haven: Massive armies of LGBTQ consoomers and groomers and furry wierdos keep this market propped up with their obsessive buying

Clown World Casino: Prediction markets, fractional ownership, celebrity endorsement. Pokémon thrives among this nonsense

Greater Fool Theory: There's always someone willing to make worse financial decision than you

Chinese Water Torture: I bet you hate seeing Pokémon references in places where they don't belong. Day after day, smug assholes derailing your board. Just join us

62183274
too illiquid and counterfeits are getting too good

62183294
>>62183004
Here's the thing about pokemon "collectors" most of them don't stay in the hobby for more than 5 years, most of them are just passing through. If you actually understood the history of the pokemon market, and participated in it outside of the relatively recent booms, you'd know that current valuations are all speculative hype. I'm just a humble autist who collected before these speculative retards entered the space, and I've netted quite the hefty profit off of their naive investment thesis.

62183306
>>62181426
>Muh physical bing bing wahoo NFTs
Lol, lmao even.

62183308
>>62181438
Try actually selling though - it's an illiquid market.

62183377
>>62183306
>He keeps dealing in the real world instead of monetizing bing bing wahoos
Kek, ngmi even.

62183400
>>62183191
>actual tangible
That does nothing because it's a children's toy, you fucking idiot. Cryptocoins like Hype next year or Avantis last year or Aero in 2024 went the distance and minted millionaires because they have utility within the crypto ecosystems whether that be RWAs, Perpdexes or Basechain, but you're too much of a retarded scammer faggot to understand the difference between something like SNDK, a stock which deals in NAND DRAM 10xing in 8 months and your little worthless beanie baby bubble because like I said in your head youv'e removed even the veneer of this shit being useful and probably are upset because you invested in dogcoins or BAYC in 2021 because you're not a serious person.

62183413
>>62183400
> Cryptocoins like Hype next year or Avantis last year or Aero in 2024
> because you're not a serious person.

I’ll take Pokémon over this garbage any day of the week.

62183417
>>62181426
an article like this = top is in.

look for the next thing

62183441
>>62181426
i assume that only english and japanese cards are worth something? i got a vendor machine where you can buy german packs but nobody uses it

62183444
>>62181426
>it's just a stupid card game for children.
correct

62183488
where am i supposed to sell 4 of these things without getting scammed?

62183494
You are unironically not bullish enough on Nintendo. See past the fud. See how they already are the next Disney and will control the entertainment industry for the next 15 years and at least for the next 100 years.

62183720
I collect magic cards
I find the game fun and me and my friends play together every few weeks.
Its a comfy investment but not a great one.
pokemon seems lonely since no one actually plays the game.

62183729
>>62183016
Yeah and the art market is totally controlled by a bunch of NY Jews.

62183736
>>62183488
Any local card shop will buy that due to its rarity, just keep calling up all the ones in your area. Goddamn I still feel sick to the stomach thinking how many of those I opened back when it was still cheap.

62183741
>>62183494
They've almost surpassed Disney already.

62183742
>>62183736
i dont wanna sell for half price though. card shops are all run by jews that will look you in the eye and shake your hand as they lie to you and rape you
>ebay buyers will scam me
>fb marketplace buyers will jump me and rob me
>card shops will rape me
>not gonna sit at a table at a convention and talk to 8 year olds and their single dads all day either
i think im just fucked

62183751
>>62183742
Good, don't sell it because it's just going to keep going up in value anyway. In 10 years it'll probably be worth almost $10k anyway.

62183755
>>62183751
this is the top
https://x.com/ashrobin/status/2050649139185115368

62183776
>>62183755
He's talked about Pokemon for years though, that's nothing new. The absolute peak will probably be this September when the 30th anniversary set comes out. After that will probably be a cool off period but Pokemon always comes back up over time.

62183785
>>62183082
I couldn't imagine being a legal assistant. That shit is gay.

t. Lawyer

62183787
>>62183776
thats ai slop
but yeah youre right it cant die before the anniversary
is there info on the real 30th anniversary set yet?

62183886
>>62181438
It's basically fallout bottlecap money.

62183943
>>62181426
Nigga this went 5x in one year, the only position you should have now is short position.

62183951
>>62181426
My very first business idea as a little kid was a website for tabulating the rarity + prices of pokemon cards
My dad talked me out of it since he thought there would be no demand and that I'd have no way of finding out all the rarities and keeping up with it all by myself
I hope I don't accidentally discourage my kids from their ideas with how hard they'll be to actualize before they actually give it an honest try

item.title: Daily reminder that LINK is the most suppressed project ever to grace the earth, and the only one that matters. — 26 replies — 104.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Daily reminder that LINK is the most suppressed project ever to grace the earth, and the only one that matters.

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:50 UTC

OP

Daily reminder that LINK is the most suppressed project ever to grace the earth, and the only one that matters.

Early replies (first 3)

62181387
There isn't a LINK suppression conspiracy. Corporations haven't been able to use it because of state regulations. It will be used when CLARITY passes, stinky.

62181404
linkbtc is stalling out, they will have to crash bitcoin if they want the trend to continue

62181427
>>62181404
then that's what will happen
prepare btc shorts

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62181431
>>62181387
>There isn't a LINK suppression conspiracy
nuh uh

62181506
>>62181431
You still don't understand.

62181776
>>62181506
You should be able to elaborate

62181787
>>62181776
mental illness doesn't have to control your life
medication is available

62181813
>>62181346
Ugh, I should have sold off when it hit nearly $30.

62182052
>>62181787
what meds do you take to dumb yourself to this level, anon?

62182809
>>62181346
>the only one that matters
Chainlink is one of the most important projects!
>>62181431
makes one think!

62183538
>>62181346
When will they stop ? Why are they doing this ? I want to escape the asylum

62183557
>>62183538
Soon

62183694
look at your 0 iq image again. the only reason your shitcoin went up in the first place is because bitcoin went up. of course it goes back down when btc sneezes

you had a 2nd chance to sell at ath($30 in 2024 is equivalent to $50 in 2021 because of dilution) and you didnt take it because you're greedy and retarded. it will be a miracle if you get a third chance

62183821
>>62181427
Way ahead of you anon

>>62183538
Its just the beginning.

62183822
>>62181346
maybe link is pointless? i mean you dont use it for anything right?

62183889
I got another one of these

62183891
>>62183889
bullrun ended the nano second LINK hit $30.000000

62183892
>>62183694
>of course it goes back down when btc sneezes

Sub-Saharan IQ detected.
The point is about WHEN btc sneezes.

62183903
>>62183889
wow people should have listened to the laughing girl midget

62183915
>>62181346
Link is not special. It's literally the same chart as every alt shitcoin. Grow up.

62183916
>>62183903
you mean the brown tranny /pol/tard? no thanks

62183922
>>62183903
laughing girl midget:
>Link can't keep up its price

reality:
>Bitcoin crashed the entire market

hmmmmm

>>62183915
Bitcoin doesn't create artificial resistance for any other altcoin.

62183947
>>62183922
Check Bitcoin against aany other alt. Ada, Dot, Avax, Uni...etc

62183952
>>62183947
I did, these coincidences pretty much never happen for those. Only Link, and then it's every time.

This pic is a great example: >>62181431

62183959
>>62183952
Solana is different. Compare Link's chart to Uni's. No difference whatsoever.

62183967
>>62183959
If Bitcoin didn't create artificial resistance for Link only it would look very different from Uni's chart.

item.title: Half of datacenter projects getting cancelled — 22 replies — 88.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Half of datacenter projects getting cancelled

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:59 UTC

OP

I told you idiots this was going to happen. These AI TechBros aren't going to be able to force 80% of the U.S. population to live in unpowered, unlit, unheated caves just so they can suck up all the DRAM and GPUs to generate tentacle porn images.

https://www.zerohedge.com/markets/here-come-cancellations-brookfield-backed-compass-pulls-out-major-northern-virginia-data

> Recall days ago we wrote that half of US data centers scheduled for 2026 would be cancelled or delayed. We wrote then that the outlook for the US AI revolution looks increasingly more dim.
>
>The data, which comes from Sightline Climate's 2026 Data Center Outlook, suggests that just 30% - 50% of the ~16 GW of planned US capacity for the year will face risks, with only ~5 GW currently under construction!
>
> According to the article, "things get even dodgier in the coming years, with the vast majority of data centers planned for launch between 2028 and 2032 having yet to even break ground. There are a further 37 gigawatts of planned infrastructure which haven’t even received a firm completion date, only 4.5 [gigawatts] of which have actually begun work."

Early replies (first 3)

62176991
>>62176967
>zerohedge
inverse this stupid gay bear shit

62176999
>>62176967
already priced in the moment they were announced and I mean that unironically. these fucks at wall street are smarter than you. dont pretend you have more information/insider knowledge than them. you are a random faggot on the internet. no move one

62177000
>zerohedge

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62177038
>>62176991
Seethe harder.

>>62177000
Nice full house, but seethe harder anyway.

62177046
>>62176967
spray data center agents in the face with DMSO solubilized carfentanil

62177103
>>62176967
>New algorithms massively improve efficiency
>AGI achieved with current datacenters
>Cancelling those unneeded datacenters saves tens of trillions of dollars making AI even more profitable
>this is somehow le bad

62177278
>>62176967
zerohed saaar! ai is bestest thing since slice bread benchod!

62177600
>>62177046
Wow, that's detailed and specialized knowledge.

Funny you should mention that; a few years ago I used DMSO to make custom transdermal medication to test whether I was having absorption issues with a medication or if it was a metabolic problem. Turned out it was metabolic, which sucks.

62179029
>>62176967
Yeah man, the AI revolution must be fake! It couldn't be that GPUs and infrastructure take time to make. Pull your money from the stock market now and I cant take your positions and you can stay poor, forever.

62179460
>>62179029
>t. most retarded take ever

Reality: there isn't enough electrical power generation capacity in the country to satisfy the AIbros' buildouts.

Reality: politicians are not going to allow the AIbros to shut off power to the entire residential market just so they can generate loli porn for /b/.

Reality: sanity will return to the memory and GPU markets as these fake and gay AI companies are forced to scale back their plans to what the physics and politics allow.

62179463
>>62176967
just be a bull and make money for once!

62179468
>>62177038
zerohedge has been consistently wrong for 15 years

62179477
>>62179460
https://newsroom.nexteraenergy.com/2026-03-20-NextEra-Energy-receives-approval-from-President-Donald-J-Trump-to-develop-up-to-10-GW-of-natural-gas-powered-generation-to-meet-nations-historic-power-demand?l=12

lol

62179538
>>62179477
Yeah, so? They'll have that built in five years.

>>62179468
I know. It's a literal Soviet propaganda website. The guy who runs it is literally the son of a Bulgarian KGB agent. He got thrown out of Wall Street and has spent the last 19 years trying to harm the U.S. by spewing literal Russian propaganda.

Once you know this and read his shit with this in mind, it becomes possible to distinguish between "this is garbage and is just what the Kremlin wants to push to harm the U.S." and "this is a rational take on the situation." Reminder that most propaganda has some truth mixed in to make it sound reasonable.

62179546
>>62176967
That's nice, but price? And chart?
Oh yeah... ATH... Get fucked FUDdy.

62180140
>>62179460
Do you think that we have lost the ability to build power plants and electricity related infrastructure lmfao? Also btw many US natural gas plants dont run at full capacity, many don't even run at half.

62180810
>>62180140
>Do you think that we have lost the ability to build power plants and electricity related infrastructure
Well, kinda. US electricity demand was stagnant for 20 years, so there was not much demand to expand the grid. The US now relies massively on imports of transformers and other electrical components, because US industry can't meet domestic demand.

62180841
>>62180140
>btw many US natural gas plants dont run at full capacity, many don't even run at half
I guess that's why California has brownouts every summer due to grid overload.

62183977
>>62180140
Excess generation capacity doesn't help if there isn't enough transmission capacity to combine the excess generation capacity and send it to a data center

62183979
>>62179538
>Yeah, so? They'll have that built in five years.
thats good

62183985
bears timeline (always wrong btw)
>i was a covid doctor genius
>i was a tariff trade doctor
>i was a strait oil man genius
>now i am a power infrastructure permit construction doctor

62183986
>>62180841
google what a nat gas peaker plant is

californias grid is a mess because of their politics. well run states never have brownouts.

item.title: siriusly bros — 20 replies — 72.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
siriusly bros

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:43 UTC

OP

we had the PC, Internet, Smartphone, and then Bitcoin and AI.. each wave stripped out gatekeepers and reshaped entire industries.
If Bitcoin is disrupting money itself the way the Internet disrupted information, what’s the next layer to fall?

What’s the next asymmetric play that’s still early, still ignored, and actually changes the base layer of how things work?

Early replies (first 3)

62176136
>>62176117
Robots reaching the level of adroitness of a Walmart wagie combined with AI about as good as it is today. It's fucking Joever then.

>Walmart wagie
>McSlop bowl assembly, most food prep
>Door dash
>Amazon slop shoveler
>Uber driver
>Warehouse employees
>Most customer service people

At that point tens of millions of people run out of anything valuable to do. And that's when government dollar collapse and people get hungry and angry. Hopefully you have a compound at that point and can afford armed robosentries

62176154
how did having a phone in your hand ot make tiktoks and youtube videos 'disrupted' dosiety

62176208
>>62176117
>Bitcoin is disrupting money itself
Schizo.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176495
>>62176117
data is still in its infancy
>still not encrypted by default
>still taking a long time to encode/decode
>still taking a lot of space
>still slow to validate

62176545
>>62176136
> people get hungry and angry
Fuck them.
There is also definitely some fuckery happening in the market these past weeks and it will definitely devalue the dollar and cause inflation

62176681
Genetic engineering. CRISPR baby already won the Olympics

62176826
>>62176117
>If Bitcoin is disrupting money itself the way the Internet disrupted information

62176866
i am disappoint

62177264
>>62176117
Who is that snu snu beast? Is that AI?

62179052
>>62177264
She's about 5'3 those are normal sized Chinese.

62180894
>>62179052
okay but who is it?

62180913
>>62180894
contribute 1st.
supreme dream asian vagene 2nd.

62180917
>>62180913
holy fuck she is real? tineye didn't find anything so I chalked it up to gen AI

62181140
>>62180917
> What’s the next asymmetric play that’s still early, still ignored, and actually changes the base layer of how things work?
mebbe i can arrange for a sharpie in the poop for you

62181170
>>62181140
okay this image convinced me it's AI

what a pity

62183885
>>62176117
What an absolute unit

62183937
>>62176117
https://youtu.be/coBf5t_Wz_I

62183942
>>62181140
https://youtu.be/coBf5t_Wz_I

62183945
>>62176117
Bitcoin isn't disrupting anything. it's completely controlled.

62183946
>>62176117
I would fuck her so hard its unreal.

item.title: admit it linkies. admit that you're not special. all you did was buy some stupid token and got lucky. but then, in a cru… — 24 replies — 31.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
admit it linkies. admit that you're not special. all you did was buy some stupid token and got lucky. but then, in a cru…

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:13 UTC

OP

admit it linkies. admit that you're not special. all you did was buy some stupid token and got lucky. but then, in a cruel twist of fate, it turns out the coin you devoted your life to was actually 90% hype. and now you are poor. reduced to normal faggotry and mediocrity, where you belong. admit these things and then there will be a path to redemption. but if you keep living in denial, you will wallow in your pathetic misery forever. the choice is yours. i am trying to help you. ALL of us are trying to help you.

Early replies (first 3)

62180296
>>62180275
No

62180322
>>62180275
"all of us" are using Chainlink - when Sergey compares the token to buying in to Linux, he was right.

62180323
what was with the fuddies getting so mind broken they started spamming gay porno couple nights back lmao, can't be real

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62180368
>>62180322
Nobody made money off of Linux.

62180382
>>62180275
My cousin unironically works for chainl*nk and it's fucking OVER

62180384
they're trying to force the linkbtc downtrend but they will have to crash bitcoin if they want any blood from this stone, no one is selling lmao

62180392
>>62180275
LINK is just like all the other shitty altcoin scams that fade into obscurity. The morons thought they were special

62180413
>>62180368
because linux didn't create a token

62180639
Why is this board so obsessed with chainlink?

62180669
HOLY SHIT

By sheer chance I happened to be watching Sunny today, "The gang finds a dumpster baby", and recognised one of the frames Asslarper used (pic related).

In this episode, Dennis (AB's avatar) convinces an activist to CHAINLINK himself to a tree, then LITERALLY cuckolds him.

>A SINGULAR TREE
>THE cuckOLDS OF CRYPTO!!!

Now do you believe me??

Inverse Assblaster; what did he tell you was useless?

62180680
>entire fud campaign based on some vc seething about ((("being wrong")))
kek

62180684
>>62180275
Hello mentally ill faggot how are you doing today?

62180685
>>62180639
99% of this boards wealth is in LINK

62180698
Its gonna be fine
People were dunking on the chainlink build rewards, rightly so because of value, but they also laughed because we had to do a quiz.

Turns out that chainlink knew about legislative action months ago before it actually got settled. We're in the whitehouse, we're gonna get our commodity status, basically every prediction market that matters adopted link. If one could argue there is one infra play in crypto, its chainlink. The only thing you're betting on is how big the institutional crypto market is gonna get, which at that point is a sure bet of substantial increase no matter what copers will say

62180700
>>62180680
>>62180684
>>62180323
hey cuckolds, check the price :)

62180702
>>62180698
Amundis spiko fund is secured by chainlink and has arguably been one of the winners in that category, its gonna be fine

Lots of replies will be just straight up coping by fudders who hold link themselves

62180728
>>62180413
If they did, it would be as useless as BAT

62180736
>>62180680
>they were wrong
>$9
insane cuckold cope

62180801
>>62180275
israel won

62181236
>>62180698
>they also laughed because we had to do a quiz.
rightly so, stinkbag

62181283
>>62180680
>>entire fud campaign based on some vc seething about ((("being wrong")))
qrd? what's the vc in question?

62181930
>>62181283
Adem is the CEO VC of the based department

62182244
>>62180275
the real joke is on you fuddie, you never wanted to be right, you wanted to be wrong,

you wanted link to succeed, but you fudded it into single digits.

the real joke is on you, you wanted to be wrong, but you were right.

now yu suffer more than the marines

62183887
fuck all stinks

item.title: anybody here got experience with buying crypto leads of BF, tele and the like? — 6 replies — 11.1/hr

anybody here got experience with buying crypto leads of BF, tele and the like? are they good? I know most of the shit is stepped on, old or straight up fake but I wonder if there are gems hidden in the shit

kek you are the boomer now

if you don't know what Im talking about then stfu

item.title: Stinkies must go extinct — 2 replies — 2.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Stinkies must go extinct

Open thread • Replies: 2 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:10 UTC

OP

Stinkie linkies must go extinct just like i-see-pees retarded chillers, they are pure useless spammers on this board and bring NOTHING useful to this place.

Honestly, just sell your useless not-needed token while BTC is above 60k, because once it hits the bottom your virtual trash is going below $5.

If you are still bagholding LINK, you are ngmi

Early replies (first 3)

62182827
indeed. stinkies simply must go
only when their garbage token of poop descends back to sub $1, will this board finally have peace

62183878
Idk man, ICP might be the next internet in a decade or two.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave — 157 replies — 628.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave

Open thread • Replies: 157 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:51 UTC

OP

https://x.com/dailymail/status/2049618941043949691?s=46

A white woman JP Morgan Executive (mega international bank) drugged and raped a married man before taking pictures of him to use as blackmail.

She would force him to take drugs like viagra so she could fuck him longer. She started buying him gifts which as sex toys including anal ones which she forced him to use and got him a position where she had direct control over him and he acted as her assistant. She also pegged him.

He was crying over the situation and talking to authorities who didn’t believe him.

She was caught when police investigated her for ties to Trump and Epstein with her blackmailing the employee being unclassified.

Early replies (first 3)

62172413
>>62172412

62172414
>>62172413
kek

62172420
>>62172413
post her tits are they big and nice?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176986
>>62176674

62176988
>>62176674
Look at those assets
No wonder she works at a bank

62176994
>>62175043
she's albanian not white

62176996
>>62175827
When the bank says there's nothing there that's pretty bad.
Also he's Indian so it's clearly fanfiction.

62177044
>>62174634
>>62174688
Basically this, it was a jeet writing his own fanfiction on his laptop but he forgot to delete them before they were checked out by LEO

62177061
>>62172448
dudes, i've never felt so abandoned by god as i do in this moment

62177089
>>62172412
what the fuck is wrong with this faggot? if this shit happened me i'd quit my job to solely be her live in fuckmeat. i'd do all the weird nasty shit she'd be into as well like huffing her farts in a gas mask.

>>During the second encounter, Hajdini allegedly ordered him to suck her toes, pushed him to the ground and sat on his face, berating him when he was unable to sustain arousal.

I don't even like toes either dude but you'd bet your fucking ass i'd be cleaning every grain of dirt off of those fucking things and smelling the fuck out of them. fucking loser faggot

62177151
lmao this is exactly how Indians think white women are. It's so obvious that it's jeet delusions

62177156
>>62177089
This is all pajeet bullshit lies. Why would you trust anyone who shits in the street.

62177231
>>62172412
Aaaaaaand it turns out the jeet literally made it all up.

62179620
>>62177089
>I don't even like X but I would do X
get your T tested, see if you're able to do a flip off a bridge.

62179655
>>62174634
>show bobs and vagene
let a man dream

62180085
>>62172412
It's fake.
How do I know?
1. No one in the US calls Indians Asians.
Let alone calling an Indian guy "little brown Asian boy"
2. He claims to have a Asian wife, but doesn't in reality.
It's buck breaking 2.0 SAARS edition

That women will forever be blasted by that fake civil suit.

62180177

62180263

62180643
>>62174634

62180823

62180849

62180859
>>62180849

Yep. I lived in Taiwan for most of the last 20 years, and the two things every white male always heard from Western female expats was (1) they can't get dates because all the white guys have yellow fever, and (2) "eww the local guys have tiny dicks and don't make enough money to date me!"

In all fairness the Taiwanese guys do have tiny dicks tho.

62180994

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 189 replies — 198.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 189 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:02 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62171998
>>62158557
NEETs have dignity.

62175198
>>62158601
Skill issue. I'm working on become turboneet through three sources and will clear 93-95k when they are approved.

62175347
>>62170481
>>62170345
Almost everyone that owns a house in a top tier city came from well off families. I don’t think the majority truly realize how important family help is and how big the wealth gap is.
Good houses in good areas are truly unaffordable for normal or people in the bottom 95%.

62175361
>>62170497
> Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.
There is nothing productive about waking up at 6am everyday. Neet is a choice but waging isn’t. I think this is what no one wants to say. No one working would choose to work if they didn’t have to work.

62175389
>>62158557
Diogenes, Buddha and Jesus was Neets
nobody remembers the trillions of wagies
being a wagie is worser than being a neet

62175537
>>62167410
the real best of both worlds is WFH wagie
>forced into a regular wake up schedule that isn’t obscenely early or late
>no commute
>less oversight allows you to better enjoy the downtime inherent to any job, without giving you so much free time as to burn out media quickly
>access to your own kitchen during breaks and all the wagie bucks to buy good ingredients
>once again no commute, allowing you to instantly switch to leisure the moment the workday is done

62176675
>>62168012
https://soul-zone.org/

62177246
>>62158601
40 years ago maybe

62177573
>>62168700
>when a girl you just saw is now CRAZY into you, to the point of saying she loved you, keep trying to makeout with you, is just all over you
pointless to think about because it has never happened and will never happen

62177728
neets arent masculine and no one respects them

62179485
At least neets get to sleep.

62179529
neets because there's nothing like realizing you wasted your whole damn life and also you're a lazy piece of shit that should've just killed yourself

62179583
>>62179529
i genuinely don't know whether you're talking about wagies or neets

62179651
>>62168700
> social media lied to me
> i didn’t participate in it
> mfw
I’m not saying you’re choosing wrong, not everyone is suited to NEET life and the world needs productive people.
But maybe just have some faith in yourself that you were making your own bad choices and then turned it around when you found motivation.

62179923
After having neet'maxxd and wage cage'd and finally landed at a job I actually don't mind that pays very well the last is infinitely preferable to both of the former, but I'd put NEET above any true wagie job. I see some people act like a mundane office job is wagie work and I just assume they've never had to work in a truly dead end hellscape position. There are some truly soul-crushing jobs out there.

62179934
>>62165202
Being able to show up at the same time every day is a skill. Dealing with people is a skill.

62179952
>>62166566
It's ok anon. You picked yourself up. I fucked off in my 20s. I wasn't a neet but I have nothing to show for it. Didn't save any money. Thankfully I did enough to get into a good law school and I just graduated at 33. But it does suck being years behind people who are younger than me and making partner. However you have years and years of career ahead of you. Don't look back.

62179958
>>62166748
People who had parents who can leave an inheritance worth anything are generally successful. You're a crab.

62180244
>>62179934
Seriously. Going to work everyday day is a skill. So tempting to just take a day off.

62180261
>>62177246
>>62177573
Ok guys
I gonna go tonight again.
and next day.
If I didn’t end up making out with a hot a girl like last time, I will get back here and tell you it might have been a fluke
>>62179651
I said that because tons of guys are also getting blasted by social media and just gave up

62180686
>>62180261
Alright night one reporting in
Fail
On to night 2 tomorrow

62181149
>>62158557
Neet
>t. Neet
If you're a wagie at least you can have a social life and if it's something like working at a bar you can easily meet girls too

62181917
>>62181149
lol
lmao

62181937
>>62179923
Give examples of some soul crushing jobs. What dream job did you land?

62183586
>>62158557
I've been both a NEET and a wagie. I prefer the wagie life because it gave me the money to buy the things I like and because it forced me to grow my persona by facing difficult situations and interacting with various kind of people

62183593
>>62183586
>forced me to grow my persona by facing difficult situations and interacting with various kind of people
NEETS laugh at this as a defense mechanism for having arrested development, unable to make eye contact

62183615
>>62180261
Either way, falling for the trap of "I was brainwashed into my decisions" is retard behavior and doesn't lead to improving your life

62183617
>>62183593
Being an introvert with superior levels of grey matter and scientific proof social interaction drains my energy isn't "cope" it's facts

62183824
>>62181937
>Give examples of some soul crushing jobs
Jobs with high death risk or very taxing to health

62183862
>>62158557
Probably wagie but it kinda depends on your job.
Believe it or not there are cool jobs out there that even a vast amount of wealth can scarcely recreate.
Being one of these adventurous cunts who sails the oceans on a cargo ship for example. Battling against tall waves and somali pirates, stopping in foreign countries and getting the opportunity to travel around for a couple days, trying the local food, watching containers fall overboard as the ship goes fucking 45 degrees sideways in a storm. The works.

That being said, I'd take NEETdom over having to flip burgers or work a register all day. And I'd take a bullet over ever having to wash dishes ever again.

item.title: META — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
META

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:47 UTC

OP

>made everyone believe that laying off people means business is growing, not experiencing tremendous problems
>started to dump on baggies (Feb 2025, Sep 2025, Feb 2026, Apr 2026)
>now even the institutions joined the dumping spree

Boy this guy is a genius.

Early replies (first 3)

62182514
>>62182477
he was never a genius, he lucked out with the right idea at the right place at the right time

62182516
>>62182514
Sounds like a genius to me

62182521
>>62182477
>Boy this guy is a genius.
nah, people have just been reduced to cattle
by glowies etc.

if anyone is geniuses it's 20th century glowniggers

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62182524
>>62182514
uh no he was actually a genius. He built software in high school and was one of the smartest in his class at Harvard...

More genius than Musk, Altman or anyone else

62182578
>>62182514
>he lucked out
Yeah I'm sure it was luck that he's a reptile and a member of the clan.

62182595
>>62182477
>acquired The Vine which was wildly popular
>killed it because it was too much competition
>Chinese intelligence makes copy cat TikTok
>entire generation hooked on chinese copy

62182597
>>62182477
meta rev and earnings are up with less employees.

62182602
>>62182595
>buys insta for 1B
genius
>buys whatsapp for 15B
genius

62182649
>>62182514
>>62182524
definitely a smart guy but he doesn't shit rainbows like his image was created to seem. Everyone wants a magical Steve Jobs' dick to suck because they want a simple
>best mommy
>best daddy
best leader to follow

62183010
>>62182524
Sergey Brin, Woz, and even Gates mog him. As a businessman/entrepreneur/visionary he is mogged by Ellison, Bezos, Musk, Jobs, Altman and many others.

62183146
>>62182524
zuck is smart, but not at the level of musk because he doesn't take risks that always pan out like musk, he chose the easiest path and got paid really well

62183283
>>62183146
>>62182524
I agree about Musk but bezod would have Zuck beat. Vitalik too perhaps

62183324
>>62182477

>BoomerBook

It’s just boomers posting the worst memes followed by unironic shitposts. I remember my ex gf would constantly tell me that her dad would make pro Trump posts daily.

62183867
>>62182516
u sound like an idiot to me. no seethe. cattle nigger.

>suit alleged that Zuckerberg had copied their idea and illegally used source code
>settlement agreement for both cases was reached in February 2008, reportedly valued at $65 million
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cameron_Winklevoss#Facebook_lawsuits

62183957
>>62182597
>earnings are up with less employees
Did you know that bathroom usage at Meta dropped when zuck painted a wall in his mansion in Florida???

item.title: MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession… — 50 replies — 42.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession…

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-05-03 14:49 UTC

OP

MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached. He says people don't do this because they either don't understand how easy it is to game the YouTube algorithm or they're just lazy. He says doing anything extreme on YouTube is still low-hanging fruit for fame and money, even now. So why haven't you taken his advice?

Early replies (first 3)

62161084
Even if that were true (doubt), doing youtube is gig-work, more akin to driving for Uber eats than the entrepreneurship that youtubers think they're engaging in. You can think you're "self-employed" until you do something that Google doesn't like, and then you'll find out who your boss really is.

62161086
>>62161076
The glownigger puppet wants more people to upload surveillance for the government online? And setting yourself up to be cancelled by mob mentality and no longer having actual skills for a job and a resume gap meaning you’ll never enter the workforce again?

62161087
i manage my own portfolio and fap all day, what makes you think im gonna get up and film my jew ass talking to a bunch of goyim for the entertainment of other goyim?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62162269
>>62161076
you also have to not be able to grow a beard above your neck

62162303
>>62161076
how do you make the thumbnail then?
I make extremely low effort shorts and get thousands of views everytime

62162786
>>62161076
Can any terminally online brown zoomer please explain to the rest of us normie chads who this guy is?

62162805
>>62161076
>So why haven't you taken his advice?
why haven't you, faggot? kys

62163322
>>62162173
I think he's more getting at an idea more than specifically advocating people walk across the US. Remember he got famous for saying "Logan Paul" 500,000 times or something i forget the amount, he did a lot of endurance challenges like that which got him famous. I think he's more saying people do something ridiculous and hard and memeable and film it but it cant be easy because then there's no skin in the game its gotta actually be hard.

62164259
>>62162212
Is this Mrbeast? Who the fuck like genuinely what fucking retarded goycattle will watch a video just because he has thumbnail like Mrbeast? Like seriously? They are a fucking meme and odd. Everyone makes fun of them not praise them like it's some sort of magic that will help your videos. Mrbeast is a clown and his goycattle fans are sub 60 IQ

62164413
this jewish white nigger slave is an industry plant, i'm not trusting a single word coming out of its mouth

62164430
>>62161076
>MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US
Fuck it, call me Sam Porter.

62168164
>>62161076
>can get a million subs
This translates to how much in real currency?

62170693
>>62161084
you can say this about anything

62170796
>>62161122
This, so much this...

62171081
>>62168164
$60k to $1M a year depending on your output.

62171130
>>62161076
some buddhist monks did that and got ran over almost immediately

62171132
>>62162786
He's a 27yo YouTuber worth billions who clawed his way out of poverty just by grinding YouTube for five years, from 2012 to 2017. He leveraged his fame to build a burger company and a hugely successful candy company, and he plans to expand to video games and other industries.

62173729
>>62171132
He actually has more debt than money he claims

62173789
I just saw a black dude getting run over doing this lol. The car hit the breaks but was rear ended and that pushed him into the black guy. Am unsure if he died.

62176468
>>62161076
it would require talking and interacting which I wont do if im walking..

62176498
I tried YT for awhile. 6 channels. What I learned is you need good content for starters. But the other half of it is abso-fucking-lutely luck. The al-gore-rythem might decide to help you out on day 2, or month 2. Then, for no apparent reason, it will say fuck you and you stop getting views. Basically I threw in the rag because an automated system fucked over one channel, and due to YT's "circumvention policy" all my other channels got nuked. My Appeals were initially instantly rejected....fast forward a few months and magically one by one they started accepted appeals after I made the case that an automated system flagged my content as "hate speech" - despite said video having ZERO talking.

62176517
>trust me dude you can make a million bucks just FILMING YOURSELF
>there is no algorithm
Also I'm gonna say it- Mr. Beast claims to be 24 but he looks like he's 39. Like. He's fake. He's not a real person. He's a paid fucking actor paid to say and promote bullshit while pretending to be more than a decade younger. Fuck him.

62176555
>>62161076
>Bro just film yourself doing extreme acts and have a professional editor and photographer do the thumbnail while your CIA parents fund your endeavors.

62176565
>>62161076
nobody cares

62176570
>>62161076
I bet this could work if you filmed the whole thing and broke it into many parts with the whole series uploaded on youtube. I think people would at least skim through the videos so you'd get views.

62176601
These guys did it and got 5k views on average

https://m.youtube.com/@theLIVINproject/videos

62179536
>>62161086
If you're thinking about being influencer adjacent, why do you are about le workforce? You're a lost cause in either direction but to put them in the same line of choices is disgusting.

62179560
>>62170693
not for the heat death of the universe

62179939
>>62161076
the richest zoomer is a youtuber it got rich giving money away what an utterly gay generation

62181338
>>62170693
If you're a contractor for WWE or YouTube your eggs are all in one basket.
If you're a racist self employed plumber or electrician you don't have the same single point of failure besides the state review board. And they tend not to take away your license for being a racist or a trump supporter

62181360
>>62161076
So why does he spend hundreds of thousands on every video if he could make popular videos for free? Does he hate money

62183841
>>62161076
>pull yourself up by your youtube straps
Kill every boomer

item.title: I'm a cockroach breader and make 10k-50k per month AMA — 25 replies — 26.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
I'm a cockroach breader and make 10k-50k per month AMA

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:03 UTC

OP

I'm a cockroach breader and make 10k-50k per month


AMA

Early replies (first 3)

62181591
>>62181573
Did you ever have an "escape" situation? haha. if you know what i mean. like, did they ever "escape"? haha. anyways, what I mean is, did it ever happen that your cockroaches "escaped"? lol. just asking for a friend, haha. like, "escaping", you know? haha. anyways.

62181600
>>62181573
Big market for breaded cockroaches? Sounds like something you'd get at an asian market.

62181602
>>62181573
I had German roaches in the new apartment I moved into and told the landlord right away. Some nigger came into my apartment sprayed some bullshit behind my fridge for 2 seconds and he left. I set traps by myself and stayed up for 16 hours killing these mother years and spraying various chemicals into the walls to kill them. Bait killed the rest. Moral of the story? White people have to take care of everything by themselves

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62181603
>>62181573
in another thread you claimed $2k a month. which is it, mr. LARP?

62181606
>>62181587
To make that much id need 50k-100k

I have a warehouse I rent where I have farm that keeps them there. I usually buy 200 dollar worth of food and have contacts who let me buy their garbage.


I'm honestly trying to get into having my cockroaches be used as a protein source since it's so cheap to raise them
>>62181573
Yeah happens all time when your raising thousands. I probably lose hundreds every month >>62181600
Yeah I mean they're used in fish farms , Chinese medicine, pet stores , lizard feed and pharmaceutical applications. I'm mostly in pet store business and help supply lot of stores in my area. >>62181602
German roaches aren't typically breezed since they're tiny and easily escape >>62181603
? Can u link this

62181743
>>62181606
>i want zem to eat ze bugs
You hooknosed coin shavers have it all wrong. Western world doesnt want to eat ze bugs. But you could convince 50% of the third world to do it easily.

62181751
>>62181606
>Chinese medicine
The Chinese considering almost anything alive as "medicine" is the reason why most global diseases in both history and the contemporary era comes from China.

62181812
>>62181606
wow up to 2 dollars a roach? who's buying? is it jews that bring keep bringing them into their apartments to skip out on rent even though the landlord is getting pest treatment?

62181820
interesting thread, wish it wouldn't turn into a fucking /pol/ thread

62181826
What do rockroaches taste like

62181833
>>62181826
it tastes like cock

62181838
>>62181812
Well I don't only sell cock roaches but u can sell their bodies , and poop as fertilizer especially to weed growers since cockroach poop is good bio stimulant.

62182327
>>62181573
I buy roaches for my bearded dragon sometimes, but always refer to them as "isopods" so I don't upset my roommates sensibilities
I do not have a question for you

62182655
kek turkish jannie rage deleted fpbp

62182661
>>62181573
I knew a guy that sold huge disgusting cockroaches to pet stores for $3-$5 each. I wonder if you're Op. I'm jelly but still seems kind of disgusting though

also this >>62181591

62182694
>>62181573
The jew fears the cockroach breeder.

62182704
>>62181573
Why are cockroaches worth so much OP? No one else wants to do it?

62183197
>>62181573
So they pay you stud fees or what?

62183302
>>62181573
That's your mum.

62183404
>>62181573
But why?

62183406
>>62181573
how is life living in chinkland?

62183695
>>62182655
what was it?

62183759
>>62181573
The jew fears the indoor roach farmer

62183782
>>62181573
how many cockroachs it take before the sound they make overlaps, resembling you standing in a screaming hell?

62183865
>>62181591
THIS DOESN'T READ HOW YOU SAY IT IN YOUR FUCKING HEAD YOU STUPID NIGGER NOBODY ON THE INTERNET KNOWS YOUR RETARDED DUMB FUCK PERSONALITY ONLINE DUMBASS

item.title: Old guy in Corvette cope — 64 replies — 23.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Old guy in Corvette cope

Open thread • Replies: 64 • Updated: 2026-05-03 13:13 UTC

OP

This will be YOU, just some cringe old fart finally getting his dream car after muh 401k investing for 40 years.

If you're not investing everything into Bitcoin RIGHT NOW to potentially make it in 10 years while you still have some youth left it's fucking over for you. I hope I make it live like a fucking king in my youth while you will be waging till 60 years old.

MAKE IT OR DIE

Early replies (first 3)

62181483
i would rather buy a corvette over buying bitcoin at 78K

62181491
>>62181462

No I bought my dream car 3 years ago and it got repossessed and emptied my 401k and have to declare bankruptcy. I'm only 35 though.

62181498
are we just glossing over the fact there's a fucking dinosaur in the background?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62181667
>>62181638
i parked it in a room in my house

>>62181628
when i reach 1M i will buy a 10k worth toyota

62181694
>>62181619
This would be nice if boomers in trucks and brown people didn't try to kill you when you ride this on the side of a road in america

62181708
>>62181619
If I could get by with just a bike, I would. But it's completely impossible where I live.

I don't think I'd buy a sports car if I made it. Weirdly I love racing, but the cars themselves don't interest me a ton. I'd probably do that thing where you go to a race track and get to drive around a provided car for an hour or two. Just to get it out of my system.

62181782
>>62181534
Automatic transmissions are for women.

62181817
>>62181531
Your life is over when you die, faggot. And one even may say that's only the beginning. I can take you for a ride in my brand new corvette if you want and then drink a cuppa of beers
t. Corvette boomer in picrel

62181855
>>62181462
Nah I'm a toyota man. GM = garbage machines. I do like the old camaros though

62181861
>>62181572
literally rental vibes, they day of showing off wealth via cars is over, you should just buy the most fun car thats it

62181905
Should I buy this 2020 C-Class? I've got a toddler, but the stroller should fit in a back.

62181907
>>62181905

62182125
>>62181462
>investing? pffft I just buy thousands of lottery tickets with my disposable income
kys
yeah, it'd be nice to be rich at 25 but most of us weren't born to rich parents so it is what it is

62182131
>>62181572
If you're ugly women won't care and guys will say you're coping
if you're hot and handsome women will fuck you in a crack den and guys will envy you
if you care about what others think this isn't really the place for you

62182471
>>62181462
It will be me
But that car is a diesel mitsubishi delica

62182481
>>62181462
Already have 350 BTC, I'm one bullrun away from private jet money

62182517
>>62181462
the c8 looks cool but how can I drive a fucking automatic as a dream car? come on. I can't. I won't. That shit is gay. I'd rather just get a cooler golf cart for my 55+ community going to HOA meetings and shit. maybe one that has fiberglass that makes it look like an Escalade? do they make those? I'm not driving a fast automatic C8 fuck off with that I'll probably crash anyway. I'll take the primo golf cart thanks

62182527
>>62181782
this

62182532
>>62181491
nice buddy, real nice. A man of culture.

I was thinking about starting 72t SEPP distributions on my retirement IRA but once you turn it on you, you have to keep it distributing, right? What if I finally got a job? Would I be able to stop it?

62183177
My dream daily driver car is a 2025 lexus es300h ultra luxury. I believe I can mod it for $80k total (including car msrp) to within spitting distance of a rolls Royce in comfort and silence, minus the opulent bullshit and the ostentatiousness. My dream car was originally a rolls Royce, but it has bmw electronics so they can spy on you, no self driving, and it isn't stealthy enough. I don't want people to know I'm rich.
My first Lexus choice was the ls500h, but it's too big.
I wouldn't buy any depreciating asset on a loan, so I would fully pay for my car.

62183180
>>62181462
>till 60
Hahhahaha 80 you mean

62183185
>>62181519
yeah arizona just has them

62183189
>>62181544
>still a lot of car
is this the biggest self report of all time?

62183194
>>62181619
>work from home
im doing a survey of sorts. what are you doing that allows you to WFH after covid?

62183247
>>62181462
I’ve been driving a corvette since my late 20’s and I’m in my mid 30’s now. Skill issue.

62183296
>>62183194
IT

62183330
>>62181619
>460K
no one cares about your poorfag rubles

62183336
>>62183330
what a jewish thing to say.
if you are any race but jewish you should be ashamed of yourself. Wake up anon.

62183345
>>62181498
Don't worry, it's behind a fence.

62183408
>>62181462
This is literally that boomer wojak where he's like
>now that I'm in my 50s and completed all my life goals, I can finally get a gf

62183637
>>62181462
I retired at 24 and are back to waging at 36, not for long though.

62183644
If you dont drive a v8, lower your tone when talking to me

62183659
>>62183330

item.title: Charizard > HAWK — 32 replies — 13.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Charizard > HAWK

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-05-03 13:33 UTC

OP

You could have purchased Pokémon cards instead of getting rug pulled on a shitcoin.

Early replies (first 3)

62177375
>>62177352
grown men trying to offload their plastic bing bing wahoos onto unsuspecting children who think it's a "hobby" is hilarious

62177465
>>62177352
A girl I work with has a side business selling pokemon cards. Annually, she makes more money from that than her salary.
We work in fucking finance.
I pray for the bubble to pop just for the world to make sense again.

62177475
>>62177352
>The world has devolved to the point where grown men are trading toys for money
Uncle Ted was right this whole time.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62177523
>>62177465
I could never do that shit, humiliation ritual all the way battling other man children in isles for pokemon boxes, I would probably be sent to prison after the first time I try to do it

62177554
>>62177352
>7 years
a single crypto project got me 30K after holding for just over 1 year

62177645
What if you bought nvidia though

62177651
>>62177352
i should have listened to that zard autist a year ago

62177966
>first pack i ever opened was a holo charizard 1st edition in 1995 or w/e
>probably rotting in a landfill or my parents basement whom i've cut all contact with
shucks

62178287
*inhales*
Pokemon cards are an alternate form of currency which has all the features of currency while resting outside the functional reach of the government. Think of it as art collections for poor people. An inflated micro economy of money laundering through paintings etc. Well poor people have done the same thing with trading cards. Combine this with the fact that these little scraps of paper represent market share in the most successful entertainment franchise in history, have scarcity, suffer natural attrition, and are strongly associated with psychological tendencies like herd mentality and hoarding. Rich people are so greedy that they ALWAYS become envious of any niche club that gains value without them, so here come the fucking city slickers to inject a fuckton of liquidity into the trading card market since 2020.
This was part of clown world programming and you should have seen it coming from a mile away.

62178305
>>62177375
Buying stuff on eBay and opening pokemon-themed scratch off tickets is a perfectly valid hobby chud

62178416
>>62177352
Is this all what Pokémon is now? Greed? A pyramid scheme ending in a rugpull?

Very sad!

62178433
>>62177352
Is this for real? That tag team didn't see much play.

62178468
>>62178416
If you are speculating that this ends in a rugpull, there's no evidence to support that theory. Crypto has rotted your brain so that you think every non-traditional investment is a scheme, but you overlook the fact that people genuinely want to own these luxury assets which appear to hold value across generations.

62178472
>>62178433
It's been a trending valentines/anniversary day gift among the ultra wealthy for a few years. Nothing to do with playability.

62178476
>>62177352
good luck finding retards to sell them to, pokebaggie

62178520
>>62178468
Nta but these are entirely worthless novelty items. Are you stupid enough to think that someone bought this piece of crap for 20000K cause they thought it was worth that much? Obviously they will try to sell it later for even more absurd prices.

And if the buyer was an insane collector, that doesnt mean this card can reliably sold on the market either.

62178643
>>62178520
You sound like you're in disbelief of the events happening around you.

>someone bought this piece of crap for 20000K cause they thought it was worth that much

Have you ever seen gemstone auctions? People's value perception is skewed and you're the idiot for not turning this fact to your advantage

62178716
>>62177966
Make amends with your parents you selfish retard

62178782
>>62178520
i mean art is worthless but has had value for thousands of years anon

think of it as investing in a watch or art

62178810
>>62178716
them first
but also no

62178813
>>62177352
Always buy things with a proven track record. Recently I've been branching into 19th century rare books and japanese import pornographic switch games to diversify my collectables. Did over $20,000 dollars in sales on ebay last year using some boxes from this pic.

62178815
>>62178716
Why is the internet constantly full of pathetic faggots telling people to spend time with psycho boomer parents? Take your weird reddit chungus mentality and kill yourself in the most brutal way possible. If someone cuts ties with a boomer it's definitely because the boomer is tremendously fucked in the head, faggot.

62178823
>>62178815
because destroying the concept of a tightly bonded family is (((their))) goal.

62178989
>>62178716
>Make amends with the people who treated you like shit

You MUST be a boomer.

62179014
>>62177966
The insanely high valuations are only for cards in mint condition, so unless you put it in a sleeve right away it won't be worth that much anyway. Perfect grade holo 1st edition holo Charizard go for like 6-7 figures

62179017
leave it to materialism threads to reveal the types of angsty losers who forsake their family and would rather give money to a jewish lawfirm

62180661
>>62178476
>boring history based collectibles for boomers with dead players that kids never saw and can't relate with + limited to US market
vs
>cool fantasy collectibles for kids with active player base growing every game release + worldwide market
I don't think you get the difference, I'm not a Pokémon collector but it's obvious that it won't die until the video game license and cards competition scene doesn't collapse, kids nowadays still care about Pokémon, I'm European (whiter than you) and I don't know any players on your picrel

62180921
>>62178810
>>62178815
>>62178989
It’s for your own good, not theirs. This retard says he has a 1st Ed Charizard but he refuses to go back and take it. Trapped in a downward cycle of resentment. Those who don’t forgive others only punish themselves. Perfect example of this here. And forgiveness doesn’t mean you have to get along with that person. Just humble yourself and get over it. If you can’t do that, your pride and ego is too big.

62181195
>>62178468
This is like that scam in RuneScape where someone is "buying" something useless for 100k and someone else sees it and rushes to buy the item for a bit cheaper to sell it to them

I bet these "expensive" trades are just like that .. groups "selling" to each other to hype the price up and then some poor sucker is left holding the bag, but you made them both 10k richer kek

62181204
>>62177352
Yeah ok, in theory... because who the fuck actually buys Pokemon cards in 2026?

62183639
>>62178472
>Very expensive Pokémon cards
>It's been a trending valentines/anniversary day gift among the ultra wealthy for a few years.
Nice to see surplus value extracted from wage workers are put to good use. Proles should be proud knowing that the rich are indeed exploiting them, the head commands to the body, but at least the extracted value is put into new strategic development for the good of all society.

62183693
>>62178287
> collections for poor people

Incorrect. Poors are the ones beating the shit out of each other over restocks at Walmart. They try selling choice cards to collectors that are well off, Poors are not spending $1000s on PSA 10 slabs

item.title: What can I do — 40 replies — 6.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
What can I do

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-05-03 09:35 UTC

OP

I just turned 18 last week I have no job no career no college no car just graduated high school only have 3k saved. What should I do to continue living and make my way as an adult? I feel useless and incapable. I can walk 20 minutes to some places for work but it’s all fast food and they won’t even reply to my applications and I have absolutely nothing to put on resumes but I’m thinking about lying for minor achievements until I can get my first job. I’m NGMI right? What have you done to get up and become an adult in the world? Must I go to college? I live at home and have no government assistance. Also despite being a female anon I’m too ugly for sex work so no suggestions towards that thanks help me out finance anons, finally I don’t have a license but I can work towards that easily. In America.

Early replies (first 3)

62180503
>>62180499
>female
sell feet pics

62180511
>>62180499
go to hvac school

62180517
Pray.
>>>/bant/24269377

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62180647
>>62180644
You just have to find it in yourself to do things that you don't want to do. Everyone would rather be rotting about then putting in the work. Its kind of trite now because of all the retarded e-celeb hustle bs but all you need is my first sentence.

62180648
>>62180499
If you're a woman and you're ugly it's impossible for you to make it. Find some guy who isn't a complete loser and just have him do everything on the off chance that he makes it and then you can divorce him, take half and use it as investment capital to live comfortably into old age.

62180650
>>62180503
>>62180584
post your feet here unironically
we can judge better than you
and i once did it as well (male btw) for fun on /vg/ and it gave me few chuckles

62180651
>>62180499
>Also despite being a female anon I’m too ugly for sex work so no suggestions
just out of curiosity - would you really consider sex work if you would be good looking for it?

62180653
>>62180650
I posted my leg hair on /v/, the reviews came in as good.

62180688
>>62180584
Sounds like you are beating yourself up way too much. Everyone is bad with finance at 18. Almost noone has 3k saved up at this age. So you are already doing better than average.

Don't ever get involved in sex work and other degrading types of ''work''.

Think about what you want to do. Work with people, or preferably not with people? Outside or inside? With computers or something else? Based on that, choose a career path, you will probably need to study in some form for that. Meanwhile keep applying to all jobs you can find. Working will be much better for your mental health than rotting at home. Many of us worked bad retail/food industry jobs at your age, then eventually moved to much better jobs.

62180701
You would fell for the wage meme and you would be full of toxic like all the femcel today.

62180719
>>62180584
someone suggested nursing, its hard but the least likely to be replaced by ai, right now you are just in a paralysis analysis mode and you need to make a decision, any decision, otherwise you might regret, you can't not make mistakes at your age, in fact this is the time to make them and learn from them

62180876
go get a degree in physics or math. yeah you have to overcome your brainletism but nerds will simp for you and you get preferential treatment for jobs as a foid

62181256
>>62180499
I turned 20 in January. I'm on my fourth job, and my parents got me two of them. Try asking your parents, a relative, or a friend for a job.

62181266
>>62180499
Women are playing life on tutorial mode.
You can always just hook up with some guy with money.
18?
Marry a 30 year old millionaire.
Easy option.
Otherwise, corporations want to hire women.
Pretend to be a whatever and they'll hire you over a vastly more qualified man.

My wife is 10 years my junior. Her sister married a guy 15 years older.

62181315
>>62180644
>>62180647
What did you do to turn around, kinda lost the plot 24-33 with some actual dogshit thrown at me for a time.

I got no debt and work history, not career focused, but not much other than a paid off used car and 20k


Thinking of moving states, FL is a lost cause

62181318
>>62181315
I mean i do have work history, just nothing career like

62181323
>>62180499
Men like ugly girls more because they think they have a better chance with you. Also just start an OF and become a millionaire in a year. It's simply impossible for women to not be successful in this day and age.

62181331
>>62180499
get a job, get money. Without money you are fucked.

62181350
POST YOUR (manly) TITS NOW YOU FAGGOT

62181355
Most logical thing would be to continue living at home, saving money from your shit wagie jobs, and do research on different careers / career paths. Like what you need to study, what companies you need to apply to, what the actual jobs look like, where you would need to move. You understandably know nothing about the real world given your age and lack of support, so you literally just need to read up. See if you can get in touch with a career counselor at your local community college before actually enrolling, look at job postings on indeed, or real companies' career boards. Look at the salary ranges for whatever metro you're in, then look at rents, etc. If you graduated, you can probably figure this out. Everyone saying 'go to X school', 'become an X' is a retard. YOU need to do the research on all the options out there and pick the best one for YOU and YOUR timeline.

62181366
>>62180499
>>62180688
>>62181355
this.

You need to do the basic stuff first before being overwhelmed. Your self confidence is probably the biggest factor for you in making the process harder. Just trying something will make you feel better. If you really can't get one of those jobs by your house, maybe try just taking your gen eds at community college as you're figuring out what you want to do and researching. The idea is to just do something so you don't feel so useless and to focus on the basics.
Like if you're insecure about your looks, is it because you're actually ugly or just fat? Losing weight will help even if you don't think it will. Also work on getting your licence, that opens up a lot of freedom and is basically a requirement in america especially. Not financial advice necessarily but everything is easier if your personal life is in order and you don't feel like shit. I turn 19 next week and have just been wagecucking at a warehouse and saving. What made that a lot easier despite having a very dysfunctional working class family with lots of issues was having faith that it will be ok and working on it day by day.
You're a young girl, you really shouldn't be stressing so much if you can help it.

62181374
>>62180499
>female
just lock in a chad or beta provider early before the early 20s cock carousel/ssri's have a chance to ruin your brain have a family

62181843
>>62180499
You'll be fine OP, you just need to do some research and find what the viable jobs are in your area, pick the field of work you can tolerate the best, and don't go switching up your life everytime you're met with conflict. Just push through as much as you can and learn when you've pushed enough. You're really young still, so take a little time to just observe the world around you, get a sense of what is going on, gain a little perspective and never let your doubts and fears stop you from giving things a fair shot.

62182118
>>62180499
Google give free classes and certs on marketing and related things. You can probably do those and get a WFH job if you're willing to start from the bottom. That's what I did. I was in my 30s by then too. Made it out OK.

62182128
>>62180499
all in fartcoin baby

62182158
>>62182118
what WFH job? I'm looking for something like this so i can stack them alongside my electrical engineering career once i graduate.

62182178
Listen to the other advice in this thread, but also build your AI skills. You're young, your brain is plastic, and you'll be able to make use of AI tools better than older folk.

62182187
>>62180499
>despite being female
What made you think females are doing well?
Both genders are suffering in this k shaped economy.

62182192
>>62182187
women are taking the W2 jobs because zog has convinced them its liberating. Its actually comical they managed to pull that one off.

62182228
>>62182192
Those jobs are soul crushing. One thing I learned is females are always crying when they are in private. Never underestimate how draining it is for them to put on a happy face whenever they are in public.

62182256
>>62182228
zog is raping women in every direction. they've lied to them every step of the way for the last 100 years. its really sad. They've even been tricked into hating men. The natrual order is so fucked its really bleak.

62182262
>>62182256
Well, yeah.
Funny thing is, many females don’t even know how pathetic they are.

62183429
>>62182158
In marketing. That's what the courses are for.
